entries.round: task:The user wants to see the actual 'spec.md' and 'tasks.md' for the AI SaaS Converter based on the debate consensus. The consensus was: 1. Use PostgreSQL + pgvector (Supabase) for multi-tenant RAG, but document moving to Qdrant when index memory hits 60%. 2. Split Backend: Go for WebSocket tracking/ingestion, Python FastAPI for AI/business logic (no LangChain, use raw provider SDKs). 3. Widget: Preact/Vanilla JS, hosted via a stable loader script that fetches versioned bundles, must be CSP compliant. 4. Security: Tool calling (Calendar/CRM) uses OAuth tokens encrypted in DB, NEVER exposed to client. Write 'spec.md' (architecture details) and 'tasks.md' (implementation phases) using exactly the <write_file path="...">content</write_file> syntax. Do not output anything else.
